detail.title: Base 7
detail.content:
Given an integer num, return a string of its base 7 representation.

 

Example 1:

Input: num = 100
Output: "202"

Example 2:

Input: num = -7
Output: "-10"

 

Constraints:

  • -107 <= num <= 107

codeSnippets.code:
